# D&D Global AI Surveillance

D&D Global AI Surveillance is a production-ready Security Operations Center (SOC) interface for advanced AI-powered security monitoring and threat detection.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](https://d-d-monitoring-2026.vercel.app/dashboard) - Main monitoring dashboard
- [Cameras](https://d-d-monitoring-2026.vercel.app/cameras) - Camera management
- [Live Streams](https://d-d-monitoring-2026.vercel.app/live-streams) - Live video feeds
- [Video Playback](https://d-d-monitoring-2026.vercel.app/video-playback) - Recorded footage
- [Alerts](https://d-d-monitoring-2026.vercel.app/alerts) - Security alerts
- [Incidents](https://d-d-monitoring-2026.vercel.app/incidents) - Incident management
- [Map](https://d-d-monitoring-2026.vercel.app/map) - Geographic view
- [AI Detection](https://d-d-monitoring-2026.vercel.app/ai-detection) - AI threat detection
- [Face Recognition](https://d-d-monitoring-2026.vercel.app/face-recognition) - Face identification
- [LPR](https://d-d-monitoring-2026.vercel.app/license-plates) - License plate recognition
- [Emergency](https://d-d-monitoring-2026.vercel.app/emergency) - Emergency dispatch
- [Reports](https://d-d-monitoring-2026.vercel.app/reports) - Security reports
- [Users](https://d-d-monitoring-2026.vercel.app/users) - User management
- [Settings](https://d-d-monitoring-2026.vercel.app/settings) - System settings

## Features

- **Real-time Camera Monitoring**: Live HLS video streams from surveillance cameras
- **AI Detection**: Automated threat detection using AI and machine learning
- **Face Recognition**: Face identification and tracking
- **License Plate Recognition**: Automatic LPR system
- **Incident Management**: Comprehensive incident tracking and response workflow
- **Emergency Dispatch**: Emergency services coordination
- **Video Playback**: Review recorded footage
- **User Management**: Multi-user access with role-based permissions
- **White-label Branding**: Custom branding support
